unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: A Day in Your Digital Life
drDigitalIntro:
Simulate a full day on your computer.
• Check email, look up directions, and read the weather.
• Add a calendar event, set a reminder, and take a note.
• Use banking or shopping. This brings together everything you've learned.
drDigitalSuccess: You're ready for real computer use!
drDigitalHint: This is how people actually use computers — for real things.
